Image.Name: i_battery
Image.OnClickCode: uI_Results.f_setInfoText(i_battery, uI_Results.v_infoText.batterySize, i_battery.getX() + gr_flexGrowthPotential.getX() + gr_year.getX(), i_battery.getY() + gr_flexGrowthPotential.getY() + gr_year.getY());

Image.Name: i_flexGrowthWithBattery
Image.OnClickCode: uI_Results.f_setInfoText(i_flexGrowthWithBattery, uI_Results.v_infoText.flexGrowthPotential, i_flexGrowthWithBattery.getX() + gr_flexGrowthPotential.getX() + gr_year.getX(), i_flexGrowthWithBattery.getY() + gr_flexGrowthPotential.getY() + gr_year.getY());

Image.Name: i_flexGrowthWithoutBattery
Image.OnClickCode: uI_Results.f_setInfoText(i_flexGrowthWithoutBattery, uI_Results.v_infoText.positiveGrowthPotential, i_flexGrowthWithoutBattery.getX() + gr_flexGrowthPotential.getX() + gr_year.getX(), i_flexGrowthWithoutBattery.getY() + gr_flexGrowthPotential.getY() + gr_year.getY());

Image.Name: i_maxDelivery
Image.OnClickCode: uI_Results.f_setInfoText(i_maxDelivery, uI_Results.v_infoText.peakDelivery, i_maxDelivery.getX() + gr_absoluteDeliveryInfo.getX() + gr_year.getX(), i_maxDelivery.getY() + gr_absoluteDeliveryInfo.getY() + gr_year.getY());

Image.Name: i_maxFeedin
Image.OnClickCode: uI_Results.f_setInfoText(i_maxFeedin, uI_Results.v_infoText.peakFeedin, i_maxFeedin.getX() + gr_absoluteFeedinInfo.getX() + gr_year.getX(), i_maxFeedin.getY() + gr_absoluteFeedinInfo.getY() + gr_year.getY());

Image.Name: i_negativeGrowth
Image.OnClickCode: uI_Results.f_setInfoText(i_negativeGrowth, uI_Results.v_infoText.negativeGrowthPotential, i_negativeGrowth.getX() + gr_growthPotential.getX() + gr_year.getX(), i_negativeGrowth.getY() + gr_growthPotential.getY() + gr_year.getY());

RoundedRectangle.Name: roundRectangle2
